mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.parent_id, c.description, c.sort_order, COUNT(p.id) AS post_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN posts p ON c.id = p.category_id AND p.status = 1 AND p.is_delelte = 0 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.is_delelte = 0 AND c.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.created_by = #{createdBy} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.parent_id, c.description, c.sort_order ORDER BY post_count DESC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM categories WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, slug, description, parent_id, sort_order, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_delelte) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE categories
name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, description = #{description}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delelte = 0
UPDATE categories SET is_delelte = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_delelte = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL
